name: Lacquer Coffee Table With Glossy Dark Red Finish - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Give your entertaining space a sleek and functional style update with this Lacquer Coffee Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted from solid wood, this coffee table showcases a clean-lined, oval silhouette in a lacquer red finish that blend easily with a variety of color palettes and decor styles. Complete with four pointed legs, this coffee table is the perfect pick for serving up appetizers to guests or holding remotes, while a built-in bottom shelf offers extra storage

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 47.2. inches
Overall Height: 17.3 inches
Overall Depth: 23.6 inches
Thickness of table tray: 1.2 inches
Overall Depth of bottom tray: 20.7 inches
Overall Width of bottom tray: 44.4 inches
Distance between both tray: 10.5 inches
Distance from the floor to bottom of bottom tray: 4.44 inches
